modules.block_1783689206916:
param atk = 0.01
param rel = 0.5

static block_1783689206916_env = 0
static block_1783689206916_denv = 0

OUT[0] <- block_1783689206916_env

block_1783689206916_denv == 0 ? block_1783689206916_denv = 1/(atk*SAMPLE_RATE)
block_1783689206916_env = min 1 (max 0 (block_1783689206916_env + block_1783689206916_denv))
block_1783689206916_env >= 1 ? block_1783689206916_denv = -1/(rel*SAMPLE_RATE) : (block_1783689206916_env <= 0 ? die)

modules.block_1783703904114:
param room_size = 0.5
param damping = 0.5
param mix = 0.5

cf1_buf = delay 1557 {_. 0}
cf2_buf = delay 1617 {_. 0}
cf3_buf = delay 1491 {_. 0}
cf4_buf = delay 1422 {_. 0}

ap1_buf = delay 225 {_. 0}
ap2_buf = delay 341 {_. 0}

static cf1_filt = 0
static cf2_filt = 0
static cf3_filt = 0
static cf4_filt = 0

g = 0.28 + room_size*0.7
damp1 = damping*0.4

cf1_out = @cf1_buf
cf2_out = @cf2_buf
cf3_out = @cf3_buf
cf4_out = @cf4_buf

cf1_filt = cf1_out*(1 - damp1) + cf1_filt*damp1
cf2_filt = cf2_out*(1 - damp1) + cf2_filt*damp1
cf3_filt = cf3_out*(1 - damp1) + cf3_filt*damp1
cf4_filt = cf4_out*(1 - damp1) + cf4_filt*damp1

cf1_buf <- IN[0] + g*cf1_filt
cf2_buf <- IN[0] + g*cf2_filt
cf3_buf <- IN[0] + g*cf3_filt
cf4_buf <- IN[0] + g*cf4_filt

wet = (cf1_out + cf2_out + cf3_out + cf4_out)*0.25

ap1_g = 0.5
ap1_delayed = @ap1_buf
ap1_y = ap1_delayed - ap1_g*wet
ap1_buf <- wet + ap1_g*ap1_y

ap2_g = 0.5
ap2_delayed = @ap2_buf
ap2_y = ap2_delayed - ap2_g*ap1_y
ap2_buf <- ap1_y + ap2_g*ap2_y

OUT[0] <- IN[0] + mix*(ap2_y - IN[0])
